display.purpose: Hero titles only — one per page. Orbitron, geometric, restrained.

headline.purpose: Section titles. Space Grotesk / Cairo Bold.

title.purpose: Card headers, modal titles, dashboard tab names.

body.purpose: Paragraph copy — Inter (Latin) or Cairo (Arabic, lh 1.7).

body-ar.purpose: Arabic body. Cairo. Slightly taller line-height than Latin body.

label.purpose: Chip text, tier ribbons, footer captions. Inter 600, tracked.

price-tag.purpose: Currency amounts. Space Grotesk 700, tabular nums on. Signature.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Default rest state for every ListingCard, OfferRow, footer card, hero search bar.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Card hover lift; pair with transform: translateY(-3px).

shadows.name: coral
shadows.purpose: Warm shadow under coral CTAs, PriceTag, locale-toggle hover. The only brand-colored shadow.

shadows.name: glow-teal
shadows.purpose: TrustPanel KYC badge glow, theme-toggle interaction.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing on all transitions — exponential ease-out.

motion.name: dur-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, locale-toggle, theme-toggle, chip hover.

motion.name: dur-med
motion.purpose: Card lift, photo scale on hover.

motion.name: dur-slow
motion.purpose: Modal slide-up, drawer open, photo carousel transition.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Smallest target. Single-column lists, sticky bottom CTA on detail pages.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Listing grid expands from 2 to 3 columns.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: NavBar shows full link row; footer goes from stacked to three-column.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Listing grid expands to 4 columns; container padding-inline grows.

components.name: Primary CTA
components.description: Coral-gradient pill, Warm White text. Used for Make Offer, Publish, Send OTP. The single most-clicked control in the system.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; padding: 0.55rem 1.1rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff8366, #ff6b5b); color: #fffaf7; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.92rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; box-shadow: 0 12px 34px rgba(255, 131, 102, 0.30); transition: transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 16px 42px rgba(255, 131, 102, 0.36); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #14d4d4; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Surface-tinted pill with 1px border. Used for Save / Share / Report alongside the primary CTA on listing detail.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; padding: 0.55rem 1rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: #fdfeff; color: #516787; border: 1px solid rgba(20, 60, 140, 0.10); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.88rem; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f3f7ff; color: #0c1a33; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #14d4d4; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Locale Toggle
components.description: Round pill with a single Arabic glyph 'ع' or 'EN'. On hover swaps to a coral-honey gradient. Signature interaction.
components.css: .ds-locale-toggle { width: 2.4rem; height: 2.4rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: #f3f7ff; border: 1px solid rgba(20, 60, 140, 0.10); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; color: #0c1a33; transition: all 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-locale-toggle:hover { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff8366, #ffc94a); border-color: transparent; color: #fffaf7; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 12px 34px rgba(255, 131, 102, 0.30); } .ds-locale-toggle:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #14d4d4; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: PriceTag
components.description: The signature visual: a small coral-gradient pill anchored to the bottom-corner of every listing photo. Tabular nums. EGP suffix.
components.css: .ds-price-tag { display: inline-block; padding: 0.3rem 0.7rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff8366, #ff6b5b); color: #fffaf7; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.92rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -0.01em; box-shadow: 0 12px 34px rgba(255, 131, 102, 0.30); }

components.name: ListingCard
components.description: The canonical content card. Photo on top with PriceTag overlay, title, district + favorite row. Lifts 3px on hover.
components.html:
1,800 EGP

Like-new IKEA Hemnes crib

B5
components.css: .ds-listing-card { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #fdfeff; border-radius: 1.25rem; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 14px 42px rgba(20, 60, 140, 0.10), 0 2px 6px rgba(20, 60, 140, 0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(20, 60, 140, 0.06); transition: transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 220ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); text-decoration: none; color: inherit; isolation: isolate; max-width: 260px; } .ds-listing-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 24px 64px rgba(20, 60, 140, 0.16), 0 4px 10px rgba(20, 60, 140, 0.08); } .ds-listing-card-photo { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 4 / 3; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f3f7ff, #f5ecdc); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-listing-card-photo-placeholder { color: #8094b0; } .ds-listing-card-price { position: absolute; inset-block-end: 0.5rem; inset-inline-end: 0.5rem; padding: 0.3rem 0.7rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff8366, #ff6b5b); color: #fffaf7; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.92rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -0.01em; box-shadow: 0 12px 34px rgba(255, 131, 102, 0.30); } .ds-listing-card-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 1rem; flex: 1; } .ds-listing-card-title { display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.4; color: #0c1a33; margin: 0; min-height: 2.5em; } .ds-listing-card-meta { margin-top: auto; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #8094b0; } .ds-listing-card-district { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.3rem; } .ds-listing-card-fav { width: 1.9rem; height: 1.9rem; border-radius: 9999px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #8094b0; background: transparent; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-listing-card-fav:hover { background: #fff0eb; color: #ff8366; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Filter / category chip with optional Lucide icon. Pill radius, Awning Shade rest.
components.html: B5
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.3rem; padding: 0.35rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: #f3f7ff; color: #516787; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.78rem; }

components.name: Accent Chip
components.description: Coral-soft variant — used to surface the category on listing detail. Maximum one per chip cluster.
components.css: .ds-chip-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.35rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: #fff0eb; color: #ff8366; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.78rem; }

components.name: Tier Ribbon (Silver)
components.description: TrustMeter tier badge. Background is the tier color at 12% opacity, text at full. Calm, never a scoreboard.
components.html: SILVER · 612
components.css: .ds-tier-ribbon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.3rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-tier-silver { background: rgba(100, 116, 139, 0.12); color: #64748b; }

components.name: Input — Hero Search
components.description: Pill-shaped search field anchored in the home hero. Lucide search icon at start (RTL-aware).
components.css: .ds-search-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.7rem 1rem; background: #fdfeff; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(20, 60, 140, 0.10); box-shadow: 0 14px 42px rgba(20, 60, 140, 0.10), 0 2px 6px rgba(20, 60, 140, 0.06); color: #8094b0; transition: border-color 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 160ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); max-width: 32rem; } .ds-search-bar:focus-within { border-color: #ff8366; box-shadow: 0 12px 34px rgba(255, 131, 102, 0.30); } .ds-search-bar input { flex: 1; border: 0; background: transparent; outline: none; font: inherit; font-size: 0.92rem; color: #0c1a33; } .ds-search-bar input::placeholder { color: #8094b0; }

components.name: Navigation Brand
components.description: Logotype: Store icon in a coral-gradient rounded square + 'كانتو' / 'Kanto' wordmark. Sticky nav anchor.
components.html: Kanto
components.css: .ds-nav-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; text-decoration: none; color: #0c1a33; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.15rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-nav-brand-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2rem; height: 2rem; border-radius: 0.875rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff8366, #ffc94a); color: #fffaf7; box-shadow: 0 12px 34px rgba(255, 131, 102, 0.30); }

narrative.overview:
Souk ElKanto is the design language of a curated, indoor neighborhood market: stallkeepers you know by name, warm filtered light through fabric awnings, conversations over coffee. The system anchors on Sunny Horizon in light mode (daylight, sky, coral warmth) and Aurora Night in dark mode (deep navy, lagoon teal, warm-tinted near-white text). Both themes share the same souk metaphor: a covered space, never floodlit, never sterile.

This is a marketplace, but it explicitly rejects the classifieds vocabulary. Listings are stalls, not rows of ads. The signature coral (#ff8366) appears as a CTA accent and price tag — never as a sticker or a countdown. Trust signals (KYC verified, TrustMeter tier) precede the price visually on every listing. The grid breathes: two columns on mobile, never four. White-space is non-negotiable. Density is reserved for the seller dashboard, never the public browse surface.

The system descends from MadinatyAI's Sunny Horizon palette (deep navy text on cool-blue ground) and adds Souk ElKanto-specific tokens — --kanto-coral, --kanto-stall, --kanto-stall-edge — that carry the warm-craft character.
keyCharacteristics: One signature accent (Stallkeeper Coral) used on ≤15% of any screen
Ambient tinted glows, never hard black drop-shadows
Tabular numerals on every price tag, currency suffix in user language
RTL is a first-class layout direction, not a flip-translation
The hero panel uses stall-paper cream + coral radial; no other surface does
TrustMeter tier is a calm ribbon (Quiet Slate → Verdigris), never a leaderboard

rules.name: The Coral Restraint Rule
rules.body: Stallkeeper Coral appears on ≤15% of any rendered surface. If a screen would push past 15%, the coral retreats to the Price Tag and CTA only. Decorative coral on background-coral is never used.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Neutrals Rule
rules.body: #000 and #fff are forbidden in tokens, components, and ad-hoc styles. Every neutral is tinted toward blue (cool family) or warm (stall-paper, warm-white). Pure black/white kills the souk feel and produces SaaS-cream cliché.

rules.name: The Warmth-Anchor Rule
rules.body: Stall Paper (#f5ecdc) is the ONLY warm surface; everything else stays cool. Spreading the warm tone across multiple surfaces destroys the 'covered, single light source' metaphor.

rules.name: The Tabular-Nums-on-Prices Rule
rules.body: Every price renders with font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums. Misaligned 3-vs-4-digit prices in a grid look untrustworthy; tabular nums lock the column.

rules.name: The Arabic-First Rule
rules.body: The default --font-body becomes Cairo when [lang='ar'] or [dir='rtl']. Arabic line-height is 1.7 (Latin is 1.6) — Arabic ascenders/descenders need the extra room to breathe.

rules.name: The Display-Rationing Rule
rules.body: Orbitron Display appears at most twice per route: the hero title, and the price on a focused ListingCard. Spreading Display further dilutes its impact.

rules.name: The Flat-Background-Rule
rules.body: The page background is flat. Depth is established by surface cards, not by gradient washes on the body. The radial-gradient in .site-bg is decorative atmosphere; it never carries hierarchy.

rules.name: The Tinted-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every shadow uses rgba(20, 60, 140, x) (Resident Indigo low-opacity) or rgba(255, 131, 102, x) (Stallkeeper Coral). rgba(0, 0, 0, x) is forbidden in light mode.

dos: Do lead every listing with the KYC + TrustMeter tier ribbon, then the title, then the price. The trust signal precedes the offer.
Do use Stallkeeper Coral on ≤15% of any screen. Reserve it for the Price Tag and the primary CTA. If you find yourself painting a third surface in coral, restructure.
Do put Arabic line-height at 1.7 and Latin at 1.6. The mixed rendering needs the extra Arabic room.
Do flow numbers through font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums whenever they sit in a column or grid.
Do lift cards on hover by 3px with transform, not by deepening shadow alone. The micro-movement is what reads as warmth.
Do mirror chevrons and arrows in RTL via [dir='rtl'] CSS rules. Symbolic icons (search, heart, store) stay un-mirrored.
Do use logical properties (margin-inline-start, inset-inline-end, padding-inline) so every component flips correctly between AR and EN.
Do carry the dual-logo footer (MadinatyAI + ZSolutions) on every authenticated route. Attribution is not optional.
donts: Don't use #000 or #fff anywhere. Every neutral is tinted toward blue or warm.
Don't apply border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe on any card, alert, or list row. Side-stripe borders are banned.
Don't use background-clip: text to make the brand text run a coral-to-honey gradient. Gradient text is decorative cliché; use a single solid color.
Don't show a glassy backdrop-filter blur on hero panels, modals, or 'premium' tiles. Glassmorphism is reserved for the sticky NavBar and the (later) WalletDrawer slide-in.
Don't look like OLX or Dubizzle. No banner ads anywhere. No 'Recommended Sponsored' rows. No price-strikethrough discounts.
Don't look like Facebook Marketplace. No infinite-scroll without curation. No mixed-quality grid. No DM-the-seller shortcut bypassing the offer flow.
Don't look like crypto / web3 dashboards. No neon-on-black, no monospace anywhere except in (future) developer/diagnostic surfaces. Aurora Night uses navy and tinted lagoon, not black.
Don't look like generic SaaS-cream. No flat-white background + navy text + blue-gradient CTA. We have stall-paper warmth; use it.
Don't use FLASH-SALE energy: no red countdown timers, no 'ENDS IN' copy, no urgent oranges, no hero carousels of discount stickers.
Don't make the TrustMeter tier a leaderboard. No top-100 boards, no public rankings, no big visible point counters. The tier badge is a calm ribbon.
Don't nest cards. A card inside a card is always wrong. Use whitespace and tonal separation instead.
Don't call coral 'red' or 'orange' anywhere in the UI copy. It is coral.
Don't trigger celebratory animation (confetti, sparkle bursts, scale-up bounces) on routine actions — favorite, scroll, browse. Save delight for tier-up and confirmed-handover.
Don't ever ship a string that exists in only one locale. AR and EN parity is enforced; the typed messages/{ar,en}.json shape catches missing keys.
